DURATION OF EMERGENCY POWER · per station · time on backup battery during window

Each event = one transition from grid power → backup battery (a single grid-loss). Multiple events at the same site = multiple separate outages (or repeated grid flickers). Duration shown is time without grid power, not necessarily time on battery — outages longer than the UPS battery life mean the station was offline for most of that time. Sources: ac_input_voltage (Adel UPS · direct measurement) and sar_alert_power_source_* (Back-UPS Pro · event-pair reconstruction).

PATH CONNECTIONS · station connection health

Each row = one station. Uptime = how long it was reachable. Downtime = how long it was fully offline. Sources: sar_status_connection_online gauge for uptime/downtime · sar_alert_connection_state_*_total counters for failover events. Note: per-SIM detail (SIM1 vs SIM2) is not yet available — Prometheus does not distinguish slot. Cellular session durations (used internally for classification) are estimated by event timing.

7 / 264
Stations that produced no GNSS observations during the window. Each row shows the most likely cause based on connection events, power events, deployment status, and observation history.
STATIONSTATUS — what we observed
CADV0xUSALong-term silent — No data received in over 31 days. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.
IADU0xUSALong-term silent — No data received in over 31 days. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.
LAB00xUSAFlapping — Connection dropped 1 time(s) and recovered 1 time(s).
NCNB0xUSALong-term silent — No data received in over 31 days. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.
NVTN0xUSALong-term silent — No data received in over 31 days. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.
OHLG0xUSALong-term silent — No data received in over 31 days. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.
TXLR0xUSAPower blip — Briefly switched to backup battery 5 time(s) and recovered.

DURATION OF EMERGENCY POWER · per station · time on backup battery during window

Each event = one transition from grid power → backup battery (a single grid-loss). Multiple events at the same site = multiple separate outages (or repeated grid flickers). Duration shown is time without grid power, not necessarily time on battery — outages longer than the UPS battery life mean the station was offline for most of that time. Sources: ac_input_voltage (Adel UPS · direct measurement) and sar_alert_power_source_* (Back-UPS Pro · event-pair reconstruction).

ADVISORY · 16 site(s) had an unpaired backup_battery alert
These stations were observably online throughout the window but had a sar_alert_power_source_backup_battery_total increment with no corresponding grid_power_total recovery. Likely a spurious NetCloud alert or a brief recovery whose alert was dropped. Not counted in the KPIs above.
CASA0xUSACASO0xUSACAWY0xUSAFLOP0xUSAIAFD0xUSAINFN0xUSAMTCO0xUSAMTHT0xUSANCTC0xUSANVLV0xUSANYSJ0xUSAPAMF0xUSATXGV0xUSAVAAB0xUSAWAMW0xUSAWIJO0xUSA

PATH CONNECTIONS · station connection health

Each row = one station. Uptime = how long it was reachable. Downtime = how long it was fully offline. Sources: sar_status_connection_online gauge for uptime/downtime · sar_alert_connection_state_*_total counters for failover events. Note: per-SIM detail (SIM1 vs SIM2) is not yet available — Prometheus does not distinguish slot. Cellular session durations (used internally for classification) are estimated by event timing.

DATA ACCURACY
ColumnSourceConfidenceNotes
Uptime / Downtimesar_status_connection_online gauge · 60s step✓ DIRECTMeasured. Resolution ±60s per state transition.
Failover events (mdm / online / offline)sar_alert_connection_state_*_total counters✓ DIRECTCounter increments emitted by NetCloud on state-change alerts.
Primary (WAN) duration= uptime − cellular duration↔ INFERREDDerived from #1 and #4. Accuracy bounded by #4.
Secondary (Cellular) durationper-mdm event session timing, capped at 4h≈ ESTIMATEDBest-effort: each mdm event timed to the next online/offline event. Sessions longer than 4h are capped (NetCloud rarely reports continuous sessions).
Current connection (WAN / Cellular / Offline)instant gauge + last-2h event window✓ DIRECTWAN/Offline are gauge-direct. Cellular detection is inferred: online now + mdm event in last 2h + more mdm than online events.
Trend arrow (▲▼·)comparison vs same weekday last week (T-7)✓ DIRECTSame gauge over same hour-of-week window.
Per-SIM split (SIM1 vs SIM2)not exposed by Prometheus✗ UNAVAILABLERequires a swift-nav/sar PR to surface per-slot metrics. Not in this report.
CONFIDENCE LABELS
✓ DIRECTObserved. Read straight from a Prometheus gauge or counter at query time. Highest trust.
↔ INFERREDDeduced. Derived via fixed logic from other DIRECT measurements (e.g. primary = uptime − cellular). Logically correct if its inputs are — trace the source chain to gauge trust.
≈ ESTIMATEDApproximated. Numeric best-effort when no direct metric exists (e.g. cellular session = mdm event → next event, capped at 4 h). Carries an unknown error margin.
✗ UNAVAILABLENot exposed by any data source we can read. Requires upstream work (SAR PR, NetCloud API) before we can surface it.
STATUS GUIDE
StatusWhat it meansCount
stableNo problems. Station stayed on its main connection the whole time.81
outage, no failoverWent offline but cellular backup didn't kick in. Worth checking.143
brief failoverSwitched to cellular a few times (1–4). Wired connection had small blips.24
FLAPPINGSwitched to cellular many times and recovered each time (5+). Wired is unstable.4
STUCK / degradedSwitched to cellular but didn't come back cleanly. Station is degraded.8
ON CELLULARProbably running on cellular backup right now (best guess).—
OFFLINE (entire window)Station was unreachable the entire window. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.4
ACCOUNTDFMG — single-customer view250 production stations · 255 total telemetered
DFMG sustained 97.657% availability across 250 production stations in this window — 84 stations had downtime (180d 11h 19m total). Overall result: mixed.

Stations that produced no GNSS observations during the window. Each row shows the most likely cause based on connection events, power events, deployment status, and observation history.
STATIONSTATUS — what we observed
ITSL0xITALong-term silent — No data received in over 31 days. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.
RONA0xROULong-term silent — No data received in over 31 days. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.

DURATION OF EMERGENCY POWER · per station · time on backup battery during window

Each event = one transition from grid power → backup battery (a single grid-loss). Multiple events at the same site = multiple separate outages (or repeated grid flickers). Duration shown is time without grid power, not necessarily time on battery — outages longer than the UPS battery life mean the station was offline for most of that time. Sources: ac_input_voltage (Adel UPS · direct measurement) and sar_alert_power_source_* (Back-UPS Pro · event-pair reconstruction).

ADVISORY · 1 site(s) had an unpaired backup_battery alert
These stations were observably online throughout the window but had a sar_alert_power_source_backup_battery_total increment with no corresponding grid_power_total recovery. Likely a spurious NetCloud alert or a brief recovery whose alert was dropped. Not counted in the KPIs above.
DTOS0xDEU

PATH CONNECTIONS · station connection health

Each row = one station. Uptime = how long it was reachable. Downtime = how long it was fully offline. Sources: sar_status_connection_online gauge for uptime/downtime · sar_alert_connection_state_*_total counters for failover events. Note: per-SIM detail (SIM1 vs SIM2) is not yet available — Prometheus does not distinguish slot. Cellular session durations (used internally for classification) are estimated by event timing.

DATA ACCURACY
ColumnSourceConfidenceNotes
Uptime / Downtimesar_status_connection_online gauge · 60s step✓ DIRECTMeasured. Resolution ±60s per state transition.
Failover events (mdm / online / offline)sar_alert_connection_state_*_total counters✓ DIRECTCounter increments emitted by NetCloud on state-change alerts.
Primary (WAN) duration= uptime − cellular duration↔ INFERREDDerived from #1 and #4. Accuracy bounded by #4.
Secondary (Cellular) durationper-mdm event session timing, capped at 4h≈ ESTIMATEDBest-effort: each mdm event timed to the next online/offline event. Sessions longer than 4h are capped (NetCloud rarely reports continuous sessions).
Current connection (WAN / Cellular / Offline)instant gauge + last-2h event window✓ DIRECTWAN/Offline are gauge-direct. Cellular detection is inferred: online now + mdm event in last 2h + more mdm than online events.
Trend arrow (▲▼·)comparison vs same weekday last week (T-7)✓ DIRECTSame gauge over same hour-of-week window.
Per-SIM split (SIM1 vs SIM2)not exposed by Prometheus✗ UNAVAILABLERequires a swift-nav/sar PR to surface per-slot metrics. Not in this report.
CONFIDENCE LABELS
✓ DIRECTObserved. Read straight from a Prometheus gauge or counter at query time. Highest trust.
↔ INFERREDDeduced. Derived via fixed logic from other DIRECT measurements (e.g. primary = uptime − cellular). Logically correct if its inputs are — trace the source chain to gauge trust.
≈ ESTIMATEDApproximated. Numeric best-effort when no direct metric exists (e.g. cellular session = mdm event → next event, capped at 4 h). Carries an unknown error margin.
✗ UNAVAILABLENot exposed by any data source we can read. Requires upstream work (SAR PR, NetCloud API) before we can surface it.
STATUS GUIDE
StatusWhat it meansCount
stableNo problems. Station stayed on its main connection the whole time.—
outage, no failoverWent offline but cellular backup didn't kick in. Worth checking.107
brief failoverSwitched to cellular a few times (1–4). Wired connection had small blips.82
FLAPPINGSwitched to cellular many times and recovered each time (5+). Wired is unstable.10
STUCK / degradedSwitched to cellular but didn't come back cleanly. Station is degraded.46
ON CELLULARProbably running on cellular backup right now (best guess).1
OFFLINE (entire window)Station was unreachable the entire window. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.4
ACCOUNTTelus — single-customer view67 production stations · 68 total telemetered
Telus sustained 98.431% availability across 67 production stations in this window — 37 stations had downtime (32d 9h 44m total). Overall result: mixed.

STATIONSTATUS — what we observed
TNBM0xCANFlapping — Connection dropped 6 time(s) and recovered 7 time(s).

DURATION OF EMERGENCY POWER · per station · time on backup battery during window

Each event = one transition from grid power → backup battery (a single grid-loss). Multiple events at the same site = multiple separate outages (or repeated grid flickers). Duration shown is time without grid power, not necessarily time on battery — outages longer than the UPS battery life mean the station was offline for most of that time. Sources: ac_input_voltage (Adel UPS · direct measurement) and sar_alert_power_source_* (Back-UPS Pro · event-pair reconstruction).

ADVISORY · 2 site(s) had an unpaired backup_battery alert
These stations were observably online throughout the window but had a sar_alert_power_source_backup_battery_total increment with no corresponding grid_power_total recovery. Likely a spurious NetCloud alert or a brief recovery whose alert was dropped. Not counted in the KPIs above.
TSKS0xCANTSKV0xCAN

PATH CONNECTIONS · station connection health

Each row = one station. Uptime = how long it was reachable. Downtime = how long it was fully offline. Sources: sar_status_connection_online gauge for uptime/downtime · sar_alert_connection_state_*_total counters for failover events. Note: per-SIM detail (SIM1 vs SIM2) is not yet available — Prometheus does not distinguish slot. Cellular session durations (used internally for classification) are estimated by event timing.

DATA ACCURACY
ColumnSourceConfidenceNotes
Uptime / Downtimesar_status_connection_online gauge · 60s step✓ DIRECTMeasured. Resolution ±60s per state transition.
Failover events (mdm / online / offline)sar_alert_connection_state_*_total counters✓ DIRECTCounter increments emitted by NetCloud on state-change alerts.
Primary (WAN) duration= uptime − cellular duration↔ INFERREDDerived from #1 and #4. Accuracy bounded by #4.
Secondary (Cellular) durationper-mdm event session timing, capped at 4h≈ ESTIMATEDBest-effort: each mdm event timed to the next online/offline event. Sessions longer than 4h are capped (NetCloud rarely reports continuous sessions).
Current connection (WAN / Cellular / Offline)instant gauge + last-2h event window✓ DIRECTWAN/Offline are gauge-direct. Cellular detection is inferred: online now + mdm event in last 2h + more mdm than online events.
Trend arrow (▲▼·)comparison vs same weekday last week (T-7)✓ DIRECTSame gauge over same hour-of-week window.
Per-SIM split (SIM1 vs SIM2)not exposed by Prometheus✗ UNAVAILABLERequires a swift-nav/sar PR to surface per-slot metrics. Not in this report.
CONFIDENCE LABELS
✓ DIRECTObserved. Read straight from a Prometheus gauge or counter at query time. Highest trust.
↔ INFERREDDeduced. Derived via fixed logic from other DIRECT measurements (e.g. primary = uptime − cellular). Logically correct if its inputs are — trace the source chain to gauge trust.
≈ ESTIMATEDApproximated. Numeric best-effort when no direct metric exists (e.g. cellular session = mdm event → next event, capped at 4 h). Carries an unknown error margin.
✗ UNAVAILABLENot exposed by any data source we can read. Requires upstream work (SAR PR, NetCloud API) before we can surface it.
STATUS GUIDE
StatusWhat it meansCount
stableNo problems. Station stayed on its main connection the whole time.3
outage, no failoverWent offline but cellular backup didn't kick in. Worth checking.62
brief failoverSwitched to cellular a few times (1–4). Wired connection had small blips.—
FLAPPINGSwitched to cellular many times and recovered each time (5+). Wired is unstable.—
STUCK / degradedSwitched to cellular but didn't come back cleanly. Station is degraded.2
ON CELLULARProbably running on cellular backup right now (best guess).—
OFFLINE (entire window)Station was unreachable the entire window. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.—
ACCOUNTKDDI — single-customer view58 production stations · 62 total telemetered
KDDI sustained 98.861% availability across 58 production stations in this window — 13 stations had downtime (20d 7h 29m total). Overall result: mixed.

Stations that produced no GNSS observations during the window. Each row shows the most likely cause based on connection events, power events, deployment status, and observation history.
STATIONSTATUS — what we observed
JPSU0xJPNPower outage — Battery exhausted during the window. Connection dropped 4 time(s) and recovered 4 time(s). Technician likely on site (cabinet door events).

DURATION OF EMERGENCY POWER · per station · time on backup battery during window

Each event = one transition from grid power → backup battery (a single grid-loss). Multiple events at the same site = multiple separate outages (or repeated grid flickers). Duration shown is time without grid power, not necessarily time on battery — outages longer than the UPS battery life mean the station was offline for most of that time. Sources: ac_input_voltage (Adel UPS · direct measurement) and sar_alert_power_source_* (Back-UPS Pro · event-pair reconstruction).

ADVISORY · 57 site(s) had an unpaired backup_battery alert
These stations were observably online throughout the window but had a sar_alert_power_source_backup_battery_total increment with no corresponding grid_power_total recovery. Likely a spurious NetCloud alert or a brief recovery whose alert was dropped. Not counted in the KPIs above.

DATA ACCURACY
ColumnSourceConfidenceNotes
Uptime / Downtimesar_status_connection_online gauge · 60s step✓ DIRECTMeasured. Resolution ±60s per state transition.
Failover events (mdm / online / offline)sar_alert_connection_state_*_total counters✓ DIRECTCounter increments emitted by NetCloud on state-change alerts.
Primary (WAN) duration= uptime − cellular duration↔ INFERREDDerived from #1 and #4. Accuracy bounded by #4.
Secondary (Cellular) durationper-mdm event session timing, capped at 4h≈ ESTIMATEDBest-effort: each mdm event timed to the next online/offline event. Sessions longer than 4h are capped (NetCloud rarely reports continuous sessions).
Current connection (WAN / Cellular / Offline)instant gauge + last-2h event window✓ DIRECTWAN/Offline are gauge-direct. Cellular detection is inferred: online now + mdm event in last 2h + more mdm than online events.
Trend arrow (▲▼·)comparison vs same weekday last week (T-7)✓ DIRECTSame gauge over same hour-of-week window.
Per-SIM split (SIM1 vs SIM2)not exposed by Prometheus✗ UNAVAILABLERequires a swift-nav/sar PR to surface per-slot metrics. Not in this report.
CONFIDENCE LABELS
✓ DIRECTObserved. Read straight from a Prometheus gauge or counter at query time. Highest trust.
↔ INFERREDDeduced. Derived via fixed logic from other DIRECT measurements (e.g. primary = uptime − cellular). Logically correct if its inputs are — trace the source chain to gauge trust.
≈ ESTIMATEDApproximated. Numeric best-effort when no direct metric exists (e.g. cellular session = mdm event → next event, capped at 4 h). Carries an unknown error margin.
✗ UNAVAILABLENot exposed by any data source we can read. Requires upstream work (SAR PR, NetCloud API) before we can surface it.
STATUS GUIDE
StatusWhat it meansCount
stableNo problems. Station stayed on its main connection the whole time.—
outage, no failoverWent offline but cellular backup didn't kick in. Worth checking.58
brief failoverSwitched to cellular a few times (1–4). Wired connection had small blips.—
FLAPPINGSwitched to cellular many times and recovered each time (5+). Wired is unstable.—
STUCK / degradedSwitched to cellular but didn't come back cleanly. Station is degraded.—
ON CELLULARProbably running on cellular backup right now (best guess).—
OFFLINE (entire window)Station was unreachable the entire window. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.—

DATA ACCURACY
ColumnSourceConfidenceNotes
Uptime / Downtimesar_status_connection_online gauge · 60s step✓ DIRECTMeasured. Resolution ±60s per state transition.
Failover events (mdm / online / offline)sar_alert_connection_state_*_total counters✓ DIRECTCounter increments emitted by NetCloud on state-change alerts.
Primary (WAN) duration= uptime − cellular duration↔ INFERREDDerived from #1 and #4. Accuracy bounded by #4.
Secondary (Cellular) durationper-mdm event session timing, capped at 4h≈ ESTIMATEDBest-effort: each mdm event timed to the next online/offline event. Sessions longer than 4h are capped (NetCloud rarely reports continuous sessions).
Current connection (WAN / Cellular / Offline)instant gauge + last-2h event window✓ DIRECTWAN/Offline are gauge-direct. Cellular detection is inferred: online now + mdm event in last 2h + more mdm than online events.
Trend arrow (▲▼·)comparison vs same weekday last week (T-7)✓ DIRECTSame gauge over same hour-of-week window.
Per-SIM split (SIM1 vs SIM2)not exposed by Prometheus✗ UNAVAILABLERequires a swift-nav/sar PR to surface per-slot metrics. Not in this report.
CONFIDENCE LABELS
✓ DIRECTObserved. Read straight from a Prometheus gauge or counter at query time. Highest trust.
↔ INFERREDDeduced. Derived via fixed logic from other DIRECT measurements (e.g. primary = uptime − cellular). Logically correct if its inputs are — trace the source chain to gauge trust.
≈ ESTIMATEDApproximated. Numeric best-effort when no direct metric exists (e.g. cellular session = mdm event → next event, capped at 4 h). Carries an unknown error margin.
✗ UNAVAILABLENot exposed by any data source we can read. Requires upstream work (SAR PR, NetCloud API) before we can surface it.
STATUS GUIDE
StatusWhat it meansCount
stableNo problems. Station stayed on its main connection the whole time.—
outage, no failoverWent offline but cellular backup didn't kick in. Worth checking.14
brief failoverSwitched to cellular a few times (1–4). Wired connection had small blips.6
FLAPPINGSwitched to cellular many times and recovered each time (5+). Wired is unstable.—
STUCK / degradedSwitched to cellular but didn't come back cleanly. Station is degraded.—
ON CELLULARProbably running on cellular backup right now (best guess).—
OFFLINE (entire window)Station was unreachable the entire window. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.—

DURATION OF EMERGENCY POWER · per station · time on backup battery during window

Each event = one transition from grid power → backup battery (a single grid-loss). Multiple events at the same site = multiple separate outages (or repeated grid flickers). Duration shown is time without grid power, not necessarily time on battery — outages longer than the UPS battery life mean the station was offline for most of that time. Sources: ac_input_voltage (Adel UPS · direct measurement) and sar_alert_power_source_* (Back-UPS Pro · event-pair reconstruction).

PATH CONNECTIONS · station connection health

Each row = one station. Uptime = how long it was reachable. Downtime = how long it was fully offline. Sources: sar_status_connection_online gauge for uptime/downtime · sar_alert_connection_state_*_total counters for failover events. Note: per-SIM detail (SIM1 vs SIM2) is not yet available — Prometheus does not distinguish slot. Cellular session durations (used internally for classification) are estimated by event timing.

ColumnSourceConfidenceNotes
Uptime / Downtimesar_status_connection_online gauge · 60s step✓ DIRECTMeasured. Resolution ±60s per state transition.
Failover events (mdm / online / offline)sar_alert_connection_state_*_total counters✓ DIRECTCounter increments emitted by NetCloud on state-change alerts.
Primary (WAN) duration= uptime − cellular duration↔ INFERREDDerived from #1 and #4. Accuracy bounded by #4.
Secondary (Cellular) durationper-mdm event session timing, capped at 4h≈ ESTIMATEDBest-effort: each mdm event timed to the next online/offline event. Sessions longer than 4h are capped (NetCloud rarely reports continuous sessions).
Current connection (WAN / Cellular / Offline)instant gauge + last-2h event window✓ DIRECTWAN/Offline are gauge-direct. Cellular detection is inferred: online now + mdm event in last 2h + more mdm than online events.
Trend arrow (▲▼·)comparison vs same weekday last week (T-7)✓ DIRECTSame gauge over same hour-of-week window.
Per-SIM split (SIM1 vs SIM2)not exposed by Prometheus✗ UNAVAILABLERequires a swift-nav/sar PR to surface per-slot metrics. Not in this report.
CONFIDENCE LABELS
✓ DIRECTObserved. Read straight from a Prometheus gauge or counter at query time. Highest trust.
↔ INFERREDDeduced. Derived via fixed logic from other DIRECT measurements (e.g. primary = uptime − cellular). Logically correct if its inputs are — trace the source chain to gauge trust.
≈ ESTIMATEDApproximated. Numeric best-effort when no direct metric exists (e.g. cellular session = mdm event → next event, capped at 4 h). Carries an unknown error margin.
✗ UNAVAILABLENot exposed by any data source we can read. Requires upstream work (SAR PR, NetCloud API) before we can surface it.

stableNo problems. Station stayed on its main connection the whole time.17
outage, no failoverWent offline but cellular backup didn't kick in. Worth checking.—

STUCK / degradedSwitched to cellular but didn't come back cleanly. Station is degraded.—
ON CELLULARProbably running on cellular backup right now (best guess).—
OFFLINE (entire window)Station was unreachable the entire window. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.—

Primary (WAN) duration= uptime − cellular duration↔ INFERREDDerived from #1 and #4. Accuracy bounded by #4.
Secondary (Cellular) durationper-mdm event session timing, capped at 4h≈ ESTIMATEDBest-effort: each mdm event timed to the next online/offline event. Sessions longer than 4h are capped (NetCloud rarely reports continuous sessions).
Current connection (WAN / Cellular / Offline)instant gauge + last-2h event window✓ DIRECTWAN/Offline are gauge-direct. Cellular detection is inferred: online now + mdm event in last 2h + more mdm than online events.
Trend arrow (▲▼·)comparison vs same weekday last week (T-7)✓ DIRECTSame gauge over same hour-of-week window.
Per-SIM split (SIM1 vs SIM2)not exposed by Prometheus✗ UNAVAILABLERequires a swift-nav/sar PR to surface per-slot metrics. Not in this report.
CONFIDENCE LABELS
✓ DIRECTObserved. Read straight from a Prometheus gauge or counter at query time. Highest trust.
↔ INFERREDDeduced. Derived via fixed logic from other DIRECT measurements (e.g. primary = uptime − cellular). Logically correct if its inputs are — trace the source chain to gauge trust.
≈ ESTIMATEDApproximated. Numeric best-effort when no direct metric exists (e.g. cellular session = mdm event → next event, capped at 4 h). Carries an unknown error margin.
✗ UNAVAILABLENot exposed by any data source we can read. Requires upstream work (SAR PR, NetCloud API) before we can surface it.
STATUS GUIDE
StatusWhat it meansCount
stableNo problems. Station stayed on its main connection the whole time.—
outage, no failoverWent offline but cellular backup didn't kick in. Worth checking.14
brief failoverSwitched to cellular a few times (1–4). Wired connection had small blips.3
FLAPPINGSwitched to cellular many times and recovered each time (5+). Wired is unstable.—
STUCK / degradedSwitched to cellular but didn't come back cleanly. Station is degraded.1
ON CELLULARProbably running on cellular backup right now (best guess).—
OFFLINE (entire window)Station was unreachable the entire window. Likely decommissioned or hardware failure.—
DATA QUALITYEtisalat — no production stations after filter
Etisalat has 10 telemetered stations in this window, but 10 are flagged non-production in sitetracker (noc_status != "1") — so the production roster is empty and headline KPIs cannot be computed. Action: verify with NOC whether these are genuinely test/dev installations or whether the production flag needs updating upstream.

Airtel has 5 telemetered stations in this window, but 5 are flagged non-production in sitetracker (noc_status != "1") — so the production roster is empty and headline KPIs cannot be computed.
